evidence.claim: The system allows assigning an urgency level (1-5) to each patient based on their symptoms.
evidence.fact: The system assigns each patient an urgency level from 1 (critical) to 5 (non-urgent) based on symptoms.
evidence.user_story_span: assign an urgency level (1-5) to each patient based on their symptoms
evidence.fact_span: assigns each patient an urgency level from 1 (critical) to 5 (non-urgent) based on symptoms
